summary: Completed testing of visual system refinements for TradeLife dashboard. 4-layer background system, glass transparency, and most visual features working correctly. Found issues with default theme application and AI Core ambient light structure.

ui_bugs.issue: No theme class applied by default to body/html elements - page loads without theme
ui_bugs.impact: CSS custom properties not loaded until theme manually applied

ui_bugs.issue: Logo box-shadow not changing colors when theme switches - stays blue across all themes

integration_issues.issue: Cannot locate AI Core ambient light bleed structure - expected div.relative > div.absolute with radial-gradient not found

passed_tests: Dashboard loads at /dashboard with all original data intact
Background system has 4 layers: bg-layer-primary, bg-layer-secondary, bg-layer-floor, bg-vignette all present in DOM
Glass panels (10 glass-panel + 1 glass-panel-hero) have backdrop-filter with blur(16px) saturate(1.1) and blur(20px) saturate(1.15)
Glass panels have ::before pseudo-elements for top-edge highlight gradient
Glass transparency correctly set to 0.45 alpha (rgba(17, 17, 22, 0.45))
All data-testid attributes present and functional
CSS theme variables work correctly when theme applied manually
No neon outlines, particles, or animations present
All content intact: 3 attention items, 3 projects, 4 trades, 4 schedule items, 4 urgent tasks, 4 stat cards
Panels feel translucent with proper glass appearance
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Apply default theme class to body/html element on page load. 2) Fix logo glow to change colors with theme switching (should use --glow-logo CSS variable). 3) Implement or verify AI Core ambient light bleed structure with div.relative > div.absolute containing radial-gradient.
